ocr_findings.description: Image has a decorative 'コレが出る！' banner with mascot graphic at top; OCR captures 'コレが出る！' as plain text without markup — cosmetic only.
Answer key line at bottom of image ('問題8-1 ア 問題8-2 イ 問題8-3 ウ 問題8-4 イ 問題8-5 ウ') is captured correctly in OCR as the final line — no loss detected.

reviewer_notes: Page is '出る順！過去問＆完全解説' with 5 numbered exam questions (8-1 through 8-5), each with ア/イ/ウ/エ choices. All question stems, answer options, year annotations, and the answer key line at the bottom are accurately captured. Label correctly classified as exam.
